title: abeec Block Tech 20 Figures Set – Police, Firefighters, Superheroes, Astronauts & More | Compatible Toy Minifigures for Kids’ Building Block Playsets
features: This Set Includes 20 Unique Mini Figures, Featuring Police Officers, Firefighters, Criminals, Space Explorers, And Superheroes For Endless Adventures.
Fully Compatible With All Major Brick Brands, Making It Easy For Kids To Integrate These Mini Figures Into Their Existing Sets And Create Exciting Stories With New Characters.
Each Figure Comes With Interchangeable Parts, Including Hats, Helmets, And Accessories, Allowing Children To Mix And Match To Create Their Own Unique Mini Figure Designs.
Made From High-quality, Durable Materials, These Mini Figures Are Built To Withstand Countless Hours Of Creative Play, From Thrilling Rescues To Epic Space Battles.
Perfectly Sized For Little Hands, These Figures Are Lightweight, Portable, And Great For Imaginative Play At Home, On Road Trips, Or Anywhere Kids Want To Build Their Worlds.

Abeec toys introduction video Merchant video Are these mini figures compatible with other major brick brands? Yes, the figures are fully compatible with leading brick systems, making them a seamless addition to your child’s collection. What characters are included in the 20-piece figure set? The set features a diverse mix of characters—police officers, astronauts, superheroes, firefighters, and more—encouraging imaginative role play and storytelling adventures. Do the figures come with accessories or movable parts? Yes, many of the mini figures include removable hats, helmets, and interchangeable body parts, allowing kids to mix and match to create unique characters and scenes. Are these figures safe and durable for younger children? Crafted from sturdy, child-safe plastic, the figures are designed to handle rough play and are suitable for children ages 3 and up, with no sharp edges or small detachable hazards. Fully tested, includes small parts, so adult supervision recommended Can this set be used as a gift, party favour or party bag filler? Absolutely! With 20 individual figures in each box, it’s perfect for birthday party bags, classroom rewards, or as a creative, screen-free gift for young creative builders.
